title: `delta_lake_snapshot_version` persists after query
description:
### Describe the bug
It may be related to https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/87574
### How to reproduce
Create the table with [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22556159/spark.py). Then, in ClickHouse run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = DeltaLakeLocal(local, format = 'Parquet', path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/spark_catalog/test/t0');
SELECT c0 FROM t0; --gets a few rows
SELECT c0 FROM t0 SETTINGS delta_lake_snapshot_version = 0; --empty, still right
SELECT c0 FROM t0; --still empty, wrong?
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Alice', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (2, 'Bob', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, name FROM t1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE name LIKE 'A%');
SELECT id, name FROM t1 WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, name FROM t1 WHERE id = 1;
